write.reasoning: Source code explicitly calls s3manager.Upload with a small payload (11 bytes), triggering the S3 PutObject API directly rather than MultipartUpload. Epsagon instrumentation wraps SDK calls but communicates traces via HTTP to an external collector URL (env var EPSAGON_COLLECTOR_URL), requiring no additional AWS IAM permissions. No other AWS services are imported or invoked.
